cover.era_chip: 朝鮮 · 朋黨 系譜
cover.subtitle:
이조전랑 한 자리에서,
붕당의 강이 갈렸다.
cover.imagePrompt: Joseon folk minhwa + genre-painting tones. Hanji beige, ink-black, crimson, navy. Scene: a wide royal court interior at Gyeongbokgung with two distinct groups of yangban officials standing apart from each other on opposite sides of a polished wooden floor, all wearing court robes and black sa-mo official caps. Between them, an empty central walkway leading to a low throne dais. Composition: symmetric, tense confrontation, formal. Color: hanji beige + ink-black + deep crimson on one side + navy blue on the other. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

outro.tip_body: 심화에서는 동인=이황·김효원, 서인=이이·심의겸, 남인=유성룡, 북인=조식·정인홍, 노론=송시열, 소론=윤증으로 학통과 인물을 연결해야 한다.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized tree-like genealogy diagram in ink lines — one root that splits into two branches, each branch splitting again into two smaller branches, ending in four small dots. Cream #F2EDE3 base + ink-black + crimson #B45309 accent on one branch and navy #1E3A5F on the other. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
